message:
fix: verify MR bead persistence before worktree nuke in gt done

GH#1945: gt done could lose polecat work by nuking the worktree before
confirming the MR bead was actually persisted. bd.Create() returning
nil only means the local write succeeded -- if the bead is not readable
afterward (Dolt failure, corrupt state), the worktree gets destroyed
with no MR in the merge queue.

Add a read-back verification step after MR bead creation: bd.Show(mrID)
must succeed before the nuke gate passes. If verification fails, set
mrFailed=true to preserve the worktree for recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
